name: ableton-live-mcp
description: Control Ableton Live 11/12 with 154 typed tools for MIDI, devices, arrangement, mixing, automation, and offline analysis.
long_description: 154 typed tools for controlling a running Ableton Live set: session and transport, tracks and mixer, clips and MIDI, devices and automation, the browser, the arrangement, and built-in generators, plus offline tools that read and diff saved .als files with Live closed. Install the bundled Remote Script with `ableton-live-mcp install` during setup and again after package upgrades.

toolsets.title: Toolsets
toolsets.description: Comma-separated tool groups to load, or 'all'. Groups: session, tracks, clips, devices, browser, arrangement, generators, audio, analysis, offline, recipes.
